name: prose_jsonish_unquoted_single
description: Prose surrounds a JSONish object that itself needs fixing (unquoted key + single-quoted values); BAML greps the balanced span and fixes inside it. Native selects the same balanced span, then fixes it. want captured from BAML final parse.
raw: Here is the person you asked for: {name: 'Ada', age: 36} — let me know if you need more.
